name: @unchartedfr/zapcode-ai
description: AI SDK integration for Zapcode — let LLMs write and execute TypeScript safely

scripts.test:e2e: npm run sync-local-binding && npm run build && node tests/agent-scenarios.mjs && node tests/durable-sessions.mjs && node tests/tool-errors.mjs && node tests/parallel.mjs && node tests/ai-session.mjs && node tests/type-check.mjs && node tests/stress.mjs && node tests/workflow.mjs
scripts.test:scenarios: npm run build && for f in data datetime text errors sessions; do echo "# scenarios-$f"; node tests/scenarios-$f.mjs || true; done

author: Uncharted
